title: [MTR4] R-net LIGHTACE 1999T
description: R-net retexture of the LIGHTACE made by CinderaceOTS for MTR
body:
This pack adds a R-net retexture of CinderaceOTS' LIGHTACE model. It comes in both a gray livery and a white livery, based on the two liveries ran on R-net trams in The Hague. It also contains a slightly different soundset compared to the base model.

If you came here looking for the base model, this is not it, I would never have the patience to make something like this lol. Please join the [SMTR Discord Server](https://discord.gg/zM5PydRdtH) instead.
